MINI MINUTES: PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS BY AND BETWEEN ALBA INGRAM AND MEROPE-43, LLC PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA INSURANCE CODE 10134, ET SEQ.

Appearances:
Sanpreet Gill, Esq. of CATALINA STRUCTURED FUNDING, Tel: 800.449.6311;
Alba Ingram, transferee, appearing on her own behalf, via ZOOM videoconference.

Hearing held. The Court examines Ms. Ingram. After hearing, and to the satisfaction of the Court,

PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS BY AND BETWEEN ALBA INGRAM AND MEROPE-43, LLC is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)

PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS BY AND BETWEEN ALBA INGRAM AND MEROPE-43, LLC PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA INSURANCE CODE 10134, ET SEQ. (ADCAL PER STIP OF PARTIES AND APPROVAL OF THE COURT ON 1/10/23. PETITIONER TO GIVE NOTICE.)
Off Calendar Jan-25-2023 Continued To Feb-16-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. SANPREET GILL, Esq. (Tel: 800-449-6311) for Petitioner/Transferee Merope-43, LLC;
Payee/Transferor ALBA INGRAM in pro per.

HEARING RE: PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS BY AND BETWEEN ALBA INGRAM AND MEROPE-43, LLC PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA INSURANCE CODE 10134, ET SEQ.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear.

Matter discussed regarding the Court's concern regarding the discount rate in this case.

The Court grants the petitioner's request for a continuance of this hearing to file a supplemental brief.

The Court continues this matter to February 16, 2023 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. Petitioner may file a supplemental brief no later than February 9, 2023.

Petitioner to provide notice to all parties of the new hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Alba Ingram And Merope-43, Llc Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq.
Off Calendar Jan-09-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Sanpreet Gill, Esq. 800-449-6311 of Catalina Structures for Petitioner.
Alba Ingram Respondent in Pro Per.

RULING - ARGUED. Mr. Gill contests the tentative ruling and argues insurance code section 10139.5(f)(2) that the hearing is timely set. The Court announces it does not have hard courtesy copies. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER MEROPE-43, LLC's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Alba Ingram And Merope-43, Llc Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq.

Mr. Gill to deliver hard courtesy copies to the court and coordinate with the clerk via email to contestdept302@sftc.org for a hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)
